'''Deli Barl''' was the sister of [[Roxi Barl]].

==Biography==
She and her sister dreamed of becoming rich, and her plan nearly succeeded when she married the vice president of fleets for [[CorDuro Shipping]]. However, when he divorced her and took everything, Roxi killed him.
